My Bucket List Adventures

Today I would like to present you with some of my goals that would be also an ultimate challenge for me. Some of them are as simple as travel to another country while others are purely about facing my fears, so here we go!

  • Visiting Norway
  • Travelling to Singapore
  • Swimming with Sharks
  • Skydiving

Why Norway?

I always liked to travel to bond with nature, starting from simple camping to sleeping in a middle of a forest for a week to clear my head.

Norway is my go to destination because of the fjords, I would love to see the most popular one called Trolltunga. I believe this sort of view is like once in a lifetime wonder that will stay in my memory forever.

A few words about Singapore

I would love to visit this city as it's known for impressive architecture and clean environment. I would love to see Gardens by the Bay and Marina Bay Sands.

Gardens by the Bay

Gardens by the Bay is a futuristic park in Singapore famous for its giant “Supertree” structures and indoor waterfalls. It looks especially impressive at night when the trees light up and create a unique atmosphere. It combines nature with modern design, making it one of the most interesting places to visit.

Marina Bay Sands

Marina Bay Sands is one of the most iconic buildings in Singapore, known for its three towers connected by a rooftop platform. It offers amazing views of the city skyline, especially at night. The infinity pool at the top is one of the most famous in the world.

Swimming with WHAAT?

Swimming with the sharks is one of those situations you most likely would never like to be in, HOWEVER I am simply afraid of them as well as deep water. That makes it a great challenge and the only way to grow in life is by challenging yourself. One day I will definitely do it!.

Now let's talk about falling down!

Is there anything better than a feeling of cold wind on your face when you're dropping straight down from 10,000 feet?

To be completely honest I have no idea, but I am willing to find out!
